note: First calibration block. The four corridors ranked highest by ascertainment-adjusted 30-day export risk in the 20 May 2026 PHEIC-era snapshot, pinned as the method's pre-committed uncertainty test. Carried forward unchanged on every later refresh; scored against public reports on 2026-06-19.

Second calibration block, pinned before publication of the 21 May 2026 snapshot. This block augments the initial top-four block with a designed sample across the current watchlist's relative high/mid/low bands, cross-border and in-country corridors, and likely positive / likely negative controls. Because the aggregate-input model still clusters all 18 watchlist corridors in a narrow probability band, these are relative tiers within the 21 May watchlist, not absolute low/medium/high probabilities.
